seoTitle: Foxground vs Frazer Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Foxground and Frazer Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Foxground vs Frazer Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Foxground and Frazer Park.
heading: Foxground vs Frazer Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Foxground, New South Wales and Frazer Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frazer Park has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Foxground (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Foxground or Frazer Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Foxground has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Frazer Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Foxground scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Frazer Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Foxground or Frazer Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frazer Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
